name: King of Baking, Kim Tak Goo
overview: It tells the story of how a determined young baker overcomes many trials towards his goal of becoming the best baker in Korea. This story takes place in the 1970s to 1990s, starting after his conception and finishing when he reaches his mid-20s.

trailers.title: Bread, Love and Dreams | 제빵왕 김탁구 | 面包王金卓求 [Preview]
